text:
こんなこと言ったら笑われそうだけど
だいぶあたしも度胸がついたかな。

前衛の役割がわかってきたと思うし
具体的にどう動けばいいのかも。
どう？　少しは先輩らしくなったかな？

……ていうか、どんなにきみが
腕を上げても、あたしはずーっと
先輩なんだからねっ！

Go ahead and laugh if you want, but you've
gotta admit I've really been showing some guts
out there lately, right?

I've really started getting a feel for what a
Hunter's supposed to do. How we're
supposed to handle ourselves out there.

I bet it takes a load off your shoulders
knowing you have a dependable senior ARKS
member by your side, right?

And just so we're clear, no matter how strong
you get, I've still been at this longer than
you, okay!

Technicalities aside, though,
thank you for everything.
